codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: enrich_leads_with_owner_info now applies None-aware assignment for zip, owner_mailing_address, homestead, assessed_value, and roof_age, and safely skips blank/None folio values. Added unit tests cover None overwrite, preservation of existing non-None values (including homestead=False), missing-key population, and empty/None folio skipping.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker handoff logged known pre-existing warnings as discovered issues, even though mission AGENTS explicitly says those warnings should not be reported as discovered issues.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md 'Known Pre-Existing Issues' lists Vite chunk-size warning and pip global package conflicts as pre-existing and says not to report them as discovered issues (lines ~51-53). Handoff 2026-03-30T18-09-39-568Z__fix-pa-enrichment-setdefault__a9016979-f9a8-47a8-b264-f4eb5029053c.json includes both in handoff.discoveredIssues.

sharedStateObservations.observation: python-backend skill guidance appears stricter than actual workflow needs for isolated bugfixes: worker used targeted RED tests first and marked procedure deviation even though this produced the intended RED→GREEN flow.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: python-backend SKILL.md Work Procedure step 3 requires running full unittest discover to confirm failures. Handoff skillFeedback shows followedProcedure=false and a deviation for running targeted property enrichment tests first before full-suite run.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, and shared-state docs for fix-pa-enrichment-setdefault. The code and tests satisfy the requested bugfix behavior with no blocking or non-blocking code defects; review passes.
